title: Grewia commutata

It is a member of the Sapindales order, which is a larger group within the flowering plant clade.

intro: Grewia commutata, also known as the South African berry or Grewia berry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may aid in the management of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Grewia commutata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
